title: org query JSON output
description: Schema for the JSON output of 'org query search --format json'

file.description: Path to the org file containing this entry.

locator.description: OrgLocator string for this entry (id:, file::#, file::*/, or file::line).

keyword.description: TODO keyword (e.g., 'TODO', 'DONE', 'NEXT') or null if none.

priority.description: Priority character (e.g., 'A', 'B', 'C') or null if none.

title.description: Heading title text (keyword, priority, and tags stripped).

scheduled.description: SCHEDULED timestamp in YYYY-MM-DD [HH:MM] format, or null.

deadline.description: DEADLINE timestamp in YYYY-MM-DD [HH:MM] format, or null.

closed.description: CLOSED timestamp in YYYY-MM-DD [HH:MM] format, or null.

clocked_minutes.description: Total clocked time in minutes for this entry.
